column1: Junior Caminero leads today's picks with a strong track record of hitting safely in nearly 80% of his games and a favorable matchup against Ryan Gusto. Jackson Chourio offers similar reliability and gets a notable park boost in Colorado, making him a solid alternative. Chandler Simpson and Yandy Diaz are both steady options, while Luis Arraez brings his usual consistency with a slight edge from the left side. Prioritize Caminero for the best blend of consistency and matchup.
